# `annotations` table schema

Narrow-tall annotation store: one row per (trial, category, annotator) triple.

Source of truth: [`src/agent_diagnostics/annotation_store.py`](../../src/agent_diagnostics/annotation_store.py) (`ROW_FIELDS`).

| Column | Type | Nullable | Description |
|--------|------|----------|-------------|
| trial_id | VARCHAR | no | Foreign key to ``signals.trial_id``. |
| category_name | VARCHAR | no | Taxonomy category short name (e.g. ``context_loss``). |
| confidence | DOUBLE | no | Assignment confidence in [0, 1]. |
| evidence | VARCHAR | no | Pointer to trace step or transcript line supporting the label. |
| annotator_type | VARCHAR | no | Annotator kind — one of ``manual``, ``heuristic``, ``llm``, ``classifier``, ``ensemble``, ``blended``. |
| annotator_identity | VARCHAR | no | Canonical annotator identity (e.g. ``llm:haiku-4``, ``heuristic:rule-engine``). |
| taxonomy_version | VARCHAR | no | Version string of the taxonomy used (e.g. ``3.0``). |
| annotated_at | VARCHAR | no | ISO-8601 timestamp when the annotation was created. |
